title: MARA Insights 2024 Series: Operational Efficiency and Strategic Positioning
text: Marathon Digital Holdings provided a comprehensive recap of strategic and operational developments throughout 2024. Operational Excellence: MARA achieved record energy efficiency metrics throughout 2024. Direct energy cost per Bitcoin from owned sites reached $28.8K, representing competitive positioning in the mining industry. Cost of revenue per petahash per day improved 17% from Q4 2023 to Q4 2024 due to the shift to owned and operated data centers. Asset Transition: The company transitioned from an asset-light to owned and operated model, increasing percentage of owned capacity to approximately 70%. This strategic shift reduced costs year-over-year through direct control of energy sources. Hash Rate Growth: MARA's hashrate grew 115% to 53.2 EH/s in Q4 2024 from 24.7 EH/s in Q4 2023, driven by strategic acquisitions and energy capacity expansion. Bitcoin Production: Production increased substantially throughout 2024, with the company mining significant volumes of Bitcoin to build its treasury position. Strategic Vision: The 2024 year demonstrated MARA's commitment to becoming a vertically integrated digital energy company controlling both mining operations and underlying power infrastructure.
